# SentriScope

> Cyber Risk Intelligence Platform — public documentation.

SentriScope helps security teams normalize multi-tool telemetry, prioritize risk with explainable deterministic scoring, and investigate with evidence — under multi-tenant governance.

## Start here

- [What is SentriScope?](platform/WHAT_IS_SENTRISCOPE.md)
- [What SentriScope is not](platform/WHAT_SENTRISCOPE_IS_NOT.md)
- [Platform overview](platform/PLATFORM_OVERVIEW.md)
- [Product maturity](platform/PRODUCT_MATURITY.md)
- [Documentation index](INDEX.md)
